title: coelogyne oxyloba
intro: Coelogyne oxyloba, also known as the 'Yellow Tail Orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. Coelogyne oxyloba is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations also involving the use of its roots and leaves in the form of capsules or tinctures.
